name: Oak Woods Acquisition Corp
summary: Oak Woods Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company on March 11, 2022, formed for the purpose of completing a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, or similar business combination. It completed its IPO on March 28, 2023, raising $57.5 million, and is pursuing a proposed merger transaction with Huajin (China) Holdings Limited. It has no revenue and trades on Nasdaq under symbols OAKU, OAKUU, OAKUW, and OAKUR.

products.name: OAKU Public Units
products.description: IPO units each consisting of one Class A ordinary share, one redeemable warrant, and one right to receive 1/6 of a Class A ordinary share upon business combination, sold at $10.00 per unit.

products.name: OAKU Private Units
products.description: Private placement units identical to public units but non-redeemable and subject to transfer restrictions, sold to sponsor at $10.00 per unit.

partnerships.description: Proposed merger transaction target; Cayman Islands exempted company and its subsidiaries.
Business advisor to Oak Woods; received 420,000 Class B shares for nominal consideration from sponsor.

partnerships.partner_name: EF Hutton, division of Benchmark Investments, LLC
partnerships.description: Representative of the underwriters for the IPO.
Sponsor; British Virgin Islands business company that purchased 343,125 private units at $10.00 each in private placement.
